description: Dashboard Bale DGOD – Optimized: flat queries, consistent timezone, correct thresholds, trend panels

targets.rawSql:
WITH data2 AS (
    SELECT
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t."TRRSPC",
        t.status_transaksi,
        t.result_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t."TRSTAN") AS total_transaksi
    FROM (
        SELECT
            TO_TIMESTAMP(
                SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMDT"::text FROM 2) ||
                LPAD(SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMTM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
                'YYMMDDHH24MISS'
            ) AS transaction_date,
            tr."TRRSPC" AS result_code,
            r."RSSHTD" AS rc_description,
            tr."TRRSPC",
            tr."TRSTAN",
            tr."TRTRTY",
            dc.error_type AS status_transaksi
        FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
        JOIN "ASID160448_ZRSPCD0P" r
            ON tr."TRRSPC" = r."RSRSPC"
        LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
            ON tr."TRRSPC"::text = dc.rc
            AND dc.id_app_identifier = 7
        WHERE
            tr."TRTRTY" NOT IN ('21','6A','6B','C1','C2')
            AND tr."TRPROD" = 'POS'
            AND dc.error_type IS NOT NULL
    ) t
    GROUP BY
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t.status_transaksi,
        t.result_code,
        t."TRRSPC"
)

SELECT
  date_trunc('second', sr.transaction_date),
  SUM(sr.total_transaksi) AS "TPS"
FROM data2 sr
WHERE sr.transaction_date BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

WITH data2 AS (
    SELECT
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t."TRRSPC",
        COUNT(DISTINCT t."TRSTAN") AS total_transaksi
    FROM (
        SELECT
            TO_TIMESTAMP(
                SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMDT"::text FROM 2) ||
                LPAD(SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMTM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
                'YYMMDDHH24MISS'
            ) AS transaction_date,
            tr."TRRSPC" AS result_code,
            r."RSSHTD" AS rc_description,
            tr."TRRSPC",
            tr."TRSTAN",
            tr."TRTRTY",
            dc.error_type AS status_transaksi
        FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
        JOIN "ASID160448_ZRSPCD0P" r
            ON tr."TRRSPC" = r."RSRSPC"
        LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
            ON tr."TRRSPC"::text = dc.rc
            AND dc.id_app_identifier = 7
        WHERE
            tr."TRTRTY" NOT IN ('21','6A','6B','C1','C2')
            AND tr."TRPROD" = 'POS'
    ) t
    GROUP BY
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t."TRRSPC"
)

SELECT 
  date_trunc('minute', sr.transaction_date) AS time,
  SUM(sr.total_transaksi) AS "Jumlah Trx"
FROM data2 sr
WHERE
  sr.transaction_date BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
  GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

WITH data2 AS (
    SELECT
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t."TRRSPC",
        t.status_transaksi,
        t.result_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t."TRSTAN") AS total_transaksi
    FROM (
        SELECT
            TO_TIMESTAMP(
                SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMDT"::text FROM 2) ||
                LPAD(SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMTM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
                'YYMMDDHH24MISS'
            ) AS transaction_date,
            tr."TRRSPC" AS result_code,
            r."RSSHTD" AS rc_description,
            tr."TRRSPC",
            tr."TRSTAN",
            tr."TRTRTY",
            dc.error_type AS status_transaksi
        FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
        JOIN "ASID160448_ZRSPCD0P" r
            ON tr."TRRSPC" = r."RSRSPC"
        LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
            ON tr."TRRSPC"::text = dc.rc
            AND dc.id_app_identifier = 7
        WHERE
            tr."TRTRTY" NOT IN ('21','6A','6B','C1','C2')
            AND tr."TRPROD" = 'POS'
    ) t
    GROUP BY
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t.status_transaksi,
        t.result_code,
        t."TRRSPC"
)

SELECT
    date_trunc('minute', sr.transaction_date) AS time,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN sr.status_transaksi IN ('Sukses') THEN sr.total_transaksi ELSE 0 END)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(sr.total_transaksi),0)) * 100 AS "Sukses",
    (SUM(CASE WHEN sr.status_transaksi IN ('N') THEN sr.total_transaksi ELSE 0 END)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(sr.total_transaksi),0)) * 100 AS "Bisnis",
    (SUM(CASE WHEN sr.status_transaksi IN ('S') THEN sr.total_transaksi ELSE 0 END)::numeric / NULLIF(SUM(sr.total_transaksi),0)) * 100 AS "Sistem"
FROM data2 sr
WHERE sr.transaction_date BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

WITH data2 AS (
    SELECT
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t."TRRSPC",
        t.result_code,
        t."TRTRN$",
        t.error_type,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t."TRSTAN") AS total_transaksi
    FROM (
        SELECT
            TO_TIMESTAMP(
                SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMDT"::text FROM 2) ||
                LPAD(SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMTM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
                'YYMMDDHH24MISS'
            ) AS transaction_date,
            tr."TRRSPC" AS result_code,
            r."RSSHTD" AS rc_description,
            tr."TRRSPC",
            tr."TRSTAN",
            tr."TRTRTY",
            tr."TRTRN$",
            dc.error_type
        FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
        JOIN "ASID160448_ZRSPCD0P" r
            ON tr."TRRSPC" = r."RSRSPC"
        LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
            ON tr."TRRSPC"::text = dc.rc
            AND dc.id_app_identifier = 7
        WHERE
            tr."TRTRTY" NOT IN ('21','6A','6B','C1','C2')
            AND tr."TRPROD" = 'POS'
            AND dc.error_type IS NOT NULL
    ) t
    GROUP BY 1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6
)


SELECT date_trunc('second', th.transaction_date) AS time,
  SUM(th."TRTRN$") FILTER(WHERE th.error_type IN ('Sukses')) AS "Volume Sukses",
  SUM(th."TRTRN$") FILTER(WHERE th.error_type IN ('N')) AS "Volume Bisnis Error",
  SUM(th."TRTRN$") FILTER(WHERE th.error_type IN ('S')) AS "Volume Sistem Error",
  SUM(th.total_transaksi) FILTER(WHERE th.error_type IN ('Sukses'))AS "Jumlah Sukses",
  SUM(th.total_transaksi) FILTER(WHERE th.error_type IN ('N'))AS "Jumlah Bisnis Error",
  SUM(th.total_transaksi) FILTER(WHERE th.error_type IN ('S'))AS "Jumlah Sistem Error"
FROM data2 th
WHERE 
  th.error_type IN ('Sukses')
  AND th.transaction_date BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 1;

-- SELECT "TRTRN$" FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" LIMIT 1

WITH data2 AS (
    SELECT
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t."TRRSPC",
        t.error_type,
        t.result_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t."TRSTAN") AS total_transaksi
    FROM (
        SELECT
            TO_TIMESTAMP(
                SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMDT"::text FROM 2) ||
                LPAD(SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMTM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
                'YYMMDDHH24MISS'
            ) AS transaction_date,
            tr."TRRSPC" AS result_code,
            r."RSSHTD" AS rc_description,
            tr."TRRSPC",
            tr."TRSTAN",
            tr."TRTRTY",
            dc.error_type
        FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
        JOIN "ASID160448_ZRSPCD0P" r
            ON tr."TRRSPC" = r."RSRSPC"
        LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
            ON tr."TRRSPC"::text = dc.rc
            AND dc.id_app_identifier = 7
        WHERE
            tr."TRTRTY" NOT IN ('21','6A','6B','C1','C2')
            AND tr."TRPROD" = 'POS'
            AND dc.error_type IS NOT NULL
    ) t
    GROUP BY
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t.error_type,
        t.result_code,
        t."TRRSPC"
)

SELECT date_trunc('minute', th.transaction_date) AS time,
  SUM(CASE WHEN th.error_type = 'Sukses' OR th.result_code IS NULL OR th.result_code = '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Sukses",
  SUM(CASE WHEN th.error_type = 'N' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Gagal Bisnis",
  SUM(CASE WHEN th.error_type = 'S' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS "Gagal Sistem"
FROM data2 th
WHERE th.transaction_date BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1;

panels.title: Tren Transaksi - All Categories (Sukses / Gagal Bisnis / Gagal Sistem)

targets.rawSql:
WITH data2 AS (
    SELECT
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t."TRRSPC",
        t.error_type,
        t.result_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t."TRSTAN") AS total_transaksi
    FROM (
        SELECT
            TO_TIMESTAMP(
                SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMDT"::text FROM 2) ||
                LPAD(SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMTM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
                'YYMMDDHH24MISS'
            ) AS transaction_date,
            tr."TRRSPC" AS result_code,
            r."RSSHTD" AS rc_description,
            tr."TRRSPC",
            tr."TRSTAN",
            tr."TRTRTY",
            dc.error_type
        FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
        JOIN "ASID160448_ZRSPCD0P" r
            ON tr."TRRSPC" = r."RSRSPC"
        LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
            ON tr."TRRSPC"::text = dc.rc
            AND dc.id_app_identifier = 7
        WHERE
            tr."TRTRTY" NOT IN ('21','6A','6B','C1','C2')
            AND tr."TRPROD" = 'POS'
            AND dc.error_type IS NOT NULL
    ) t
    GROUP BY
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t.error_type,
        t.result_code,
        t."TRRSPC"
)

SELECT CONCAT(th.result_code, ' > ', th."TRTRTY") AS nama_error,
  SUM(th.total_transaksi) AS "Sistem Error"
FROM data2 th
WHERE th.error_type = 'S'
  AND th.transaction_date BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH data2 AS (
    SELECT
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t."TRRSPC",
        t.error_type,
        t.result_code,
        COUNT(DISTINCT t."TRSTAN") AS total_transaksi
    FROM (
        SELECT
            TO_TIMESTAMP(
                SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMDT"::text FROM 2) ||
                LPAD(SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMTM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
                'YYMMDDHH24MISS'
            ) AS transaction_date,
            tr."TRRSPC" AS result_code,
            r."RSSHTD" AS rc_description,
            tr."TRRSPC",
            tr."TRSTAN",
            tr."TRTRTY",
            dc.error_type
        FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
        JOIN "ASID160448_ZRSPCD0P" r
            ON tr."TRRSPC" = r."RSRSPC"
        LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
            ON tr."TRRSPC"::text = dc.rc
            AND dc.id_app_identifier = 7
        WHERE
            tr."TRTRTY" NOT IN ('21','6A','6B','C1','C2')
            AND tr."TRPROD" = 'POS'
            AND dc.error_type IS NOT NULL
    ) t
    GROUP BY
        t.transaction_date,
        t."TRTRTY",
        t.error_type,
        t.result_code,
        t."TRRSPC"
)

SELECT CONCAT(th.result_code, ' > ', th."TRTRTY") AS nama_error,
  SUM(th.total_transaksi) AS "Sistem Error"
FROM data2 th
WHERE th.error_type = 'N'
  AND th.transaction_date BETWEEN ($__timeFrom()::timestamp + interval '7 hour') AND ($__timeTo()::timestamp + interval '7 hour')
GROUP BY 1
ORDER BY 2 DESC
LIMIT 5;

WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        TO_TIMESTAMP(
            SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMDT"::text FROM 2) ||
            LPAD(SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMTM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
            'YYMMDDHH24MISS'
        ) AS transaction_date,
        tr."TRRSPC" AS result_code,
        tr."TRTRTY",
        tr."TRSTAN",
        tr."TRRRF#",
        dc.rc_description,
        dc.error_type
    FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
    JOIN "ASID160448_ZRSPCD0P" r
        ON tr."TRRSPC" = r."RSRSPC"
    LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
        ON tr."TRRSPC"::text = dc.rc
        AND dc.id_app_identifier = 61
    WHERE
    tr."TRTRTY" NOT IN ('21','6A','6B','C1','C2')
            AND tr."TRPROD" = 'POS'
            AND dc.error_type = 'S'
),

top_errors AS (
    SELECT
        result_code,
        "TRTRTY",
        COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM base
    WHERE transaction_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY 1,2
    ORDER BY total_count DESC
    LIMIT 5
),

ranked AS (
    SELECT
        CONCAT(b.result_code, ' > ', b."TRTRTY") AS nama_error,
        b.*,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY b.result_code, b."TRTRTY"
            ORDER BY b.transaction_date DESC
        ) AS rnk
    FROM base b
    JOIN top_errors t
        ON b.result_code = t.result_code
        AND b."TRTRTY" = t."TRTRTY"
)

SELECT *
FROM ranked
WHERE rnk <= 5;

WITH base AS (
    SELECT
        TO_TIMESTAMP(
            SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMDT"::text FROM 2) ||
            LPAD(SUBSTRING(tr."TRXMTM"::text FROM 1),6,'0'),
            'YYMMDDHH24MISS'
        ) AS transaction_date,
        tr."TRRSPC" AS result_code,
        tr."TRTRTY",
        tr."TRSTAN",
        tr."TRRRF#",
        dc.rc_description,
        dc.error_type
    FROM "ASID160448_ZTRANS0P" tr
    JOIN "ASID160448_ZRSPCD0P" r
        ON tr."TRRSPC" = r."RSRSPC"
    LEFT JOIN response_code_dictionary dc
        ON tr."TRRSPC"::text = dc.rc
        AND dc.id_app_identifier = 61
    WHERE
    tr."TRTRTY" NOT IN ('21','6A','6B','C1','C2')
            AND tr."TRPROD" = 'POS'
            AND dc.error_type = 'N'
),

top_errors AS (
    SELECT
        result_code,
        "TRTRTY",
        COUNT(*) AS total_count
    FROM base
    WHERE transaction_date BETWEEN $__timeFrom() AND $__timeTo()
    GROUP BY 1,2
    ORDER BY total_count DESC
    LIMIT 5
),

ranked AS (
    SELECT
        CONCAT(b.result_code, ' > ', b."TRTRTY") AS nama_error,
        b.*,
        ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
            PARTITION BY b.result_code, b."TRTRTY"
            ORDER BY b.transaction_date DESC
        ) AS rnk
    FROM base b
    JOIN top_errors t
        ON b.result_code = t.result_code
        AND b."TRTRTY" = t."TRTRTY"
)

SELECT *
FROM ranked
WHERE rnk <= 5;

title: Dashboard EDC Agent DGOD
